User Migration
description:
User Migration:
*Okta provided an export extension to export all the users to csv file along with their profile information.
* Passwords (hash) can’t be exported. So we can ask around 25 users who are using the password authentication to reset their password after migration to K4A. (For this user we can set some randomly generated password at Adv Suite side, as anyways the user is going to reset it.)
* The user's role is not fetchable from this export process, so we can manually check and update as the number of users is less than 100. 
* User to organization id (advertiser) mapping is part of the exported user metadata. This way we can consolidate all the user information.
* Admin users with  “internal User” flag true are Kochava users. Add or set respective users under the Kochava account in Adv Suite with mmm_admin role(with different user group - mmm_admin).
* Migrate these user to K4A.

title: AiM Offboarding | Deactivate Blub Blub and Remove Tables
description:
Task Name:
AiM Offboarding | Deactivate Blub Blub and Remove Table

Person Submitting Task:
Jacob Manfred

Accounts:
Blub Blub Inc. (4348)

Platform:
AIM

Product:
System

Task Type:
Request

Priority:
Medium

Related Tasks:
n/a

Description/Steps to Reproduce Issue::
Blub Blub Inc. has not renewed their contract with AIM. We have deactivated their K4A/PPE accounts and removed their access from AIM. 

To complete the deactivation we're requesting the deactivation of their AIM account and the removal of their data tables. 

———————————————
This task was submitted through Escalation Template
https://form.asana.com/?k=TbZ5O7anBN9ACOmbIu5ToQ&d=8559678460204

title: AIM | Data Validation (Slack message can be summarise and one output.)
description: Slack message can be summarise and one output.

title: AIM | Data Validation (Date range can be included)
description: The date range can be included as part of the failure message. Can we make this an object? This date range will help pinpoint the exact error and make it easier to identify the problematic record.

title: AIM | Data Validation (3 Validation Rules Pending)
description:
Extreme ROAS/CPA
ROAS = ∞ OR CPA = 0
Division-by-zero or missing numerator/denominator.
Warning
Flag anomaly; proceed with caution.
On hold.









































Percentages Outside [0,1]
Any rate > 1 or < 0
Rates must be between 0–100%.
Warning
Flag anomaly; investigate.
Specific user input. Not rate field available.









































Division by Zero
Any denominator = 0 in ratios
Avoid undefined KPIs.
Info
Flag anomaly; handle gracefully.
Skip for now.







































Above 3 Validation Rules are Pending.

https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1jzVWbeD14WA6abtfFYvuSUJeqPxTfAPyOnmk9B-jDYw/edit?usp=sharing

Regarding the costs for Defacto Android Facebookads. The costs in the campaign table doesn't match the costs in the platform table
in the platforms table... facebooks spend ads up to 411k in 2025-02 (which is the correct value)
in the campaigns table it adds up to 953,667 in 2025-02 (which is incorrect)

in GA portal for Defacto Total revenue is 27m
in feature_view table it is 151m

title: Populate Events table during ETL's Initialization.
Check and update the current ETL Service to use only the schema set in the secret.
description:
I have seen some codes where the application is using "public" schema only. This hard coded schema ref needs to be removed and schema from secret to be used.

    Make sure that the schema is used explicitly in all queries. (Preferred way)
    Another option is to set the SQL Path = <schema> so that all queries use the provided schema. However it may cause issues while fetching shared data from 'public' while actual data are in  tables in another schema. We may have to set this before executing that specific query.

title: Kochava Cost Transition Document
Move ML Pipeline configs from YAML to Metadata DB
Move API keys from Metadata DB to Secrets
Design incremental study module in Aim Portal.
Add an option to give date range for data ingestion.
Create a document listing the constraints related to folder structure and schema for the S3 connector.
description:
Notes

https://app.asana.com/app/asana/-/get_asset?asset_id=1210950763663228

title: Add aim-workflow-manager to support multiple data supplier configs with the same connector
description:
When we have multiple data supplier configs with the same connector, currently, the name is not unique and it is causing some issues because of duplicate names.
The proposed solution is to use a combination of name and data set to eliminate duplicates.

title: Data/Schema validation during ingestion
Data set type validations table suffixes
description: We need to thoroughly test and validate the changes made by Jason for data set types and table suffixes

title: QA deployment of table suffixes and data set types
description: Deploy data set types and table suffixes changes in QA

title: Apptopia integration for ratings and ranking (new connector)
description: We need to fetch ratings and rankings using AppTopia APIs

title: Required refactoring in the codebase.
description:
Need to move SQL generation logic to SQL building project
    Need to add a validation layer for Consolidation Rule. Will raise error before even starting Consolidation
    Need to revisit the Data Import interfaces.

title: Revisit the logic where ETL depends on the regions (which are associated to networks) configured in metadata.
Create an UI to manage the ETL config
description:
Preferably a command line tool that developers can run in their local machine
    It would connect to the local MongoDB and metadata collection. Or can be configured to point to QA.
    Once started, it would launch a web page in the default browser
    It will load the advertisers for which we need to configure the settings
    Once advertiser is selected it would fetch Apps and Regions for future use
    It shows two tabs one for Data Supplier Configuration and Data Consolidation

title: Branch Cross events API Implementation
Old ETL | Ratings and Rankings | Apptopia
Restrict connectors to one App
description: We need to restrict each connector to single app to avoid issues with offline data which doesn't have AppId details

title: Cabify data deduplication
Data Validation Service integration
description: We need to integrate a new validation service as part of ETL after the data consolidation task. It should be a new block in the DAGs

title: [Secrets] Remove Technical Debt
description:
aim-data-ingestion currently relies on the following app specific secrets
test/AIMETLService/Shared
prod/AIMETLService/Shared

This pattern is going anti-pattern with the https://pm.kochava.com/docs/Products/AIM/Guides/Secrets%20Manager/Secrets%20Naming%20and%20Organization%20Ethos migration. To go through the planned demo we added an additional secret to make it work and added an additional layer of tech debt by adding a new secret qa/AIMETLService/Shared 

The goal of this task is to get rid of this dependency as soon as possible and since these secrets are app specific, they have been migrated to new and unified nomenclature format. These secrets are already migrated to the following new secrets structure:

qa/App/aim-data-ingestion
prod/App/aim-data-ingestion 

https://app.asana.com/1/8559678460204/profile/1210331029137263 is requested to migrate code dependency on older format and start using the new standard format which will be consistent across application going forward and will be migrated for legacy services.

As soon as this is done, we will schedule deletion of these 3 secrets

qa/AIMETLService/Shared
test/AIMETLService/Shared
prod/AIMETLService/Shared

title: Slack alerts for network discovery
description: We need alerts for new networks discovered

title: Custom queries execution to correct data mistakes
description: We need an ability to execute custom queries to correct few customer specific data upload issues like we faced with Brigit

title: Move network discovery out of data aggregation
Offline networks data processing
Add advertiser name as suffix to Initialisation, consolidation, feature creation to identify logs
Break Consolidation task into separate tasks
description:
Break consolidation task into
    Network discovery
    Data aggregation
    Actual Consolidation
    Data transformation

title: Create and Accomodate shared AWS secrets
description:
We need a shared secret which can be used by all the clients.
For example, the currency converter API key

title: Support for compressed files in S3
description:
Adobe uploads compressed csv files in their S3 bucket. We will use below config fields in Advertiser config to handle this

"CompressionEnabled" : true,
 "CompressionFormat" : "gz"

title: Excel with multi tabs support
description: We need to support excel file processing with multiple tabs in it with ability to include or exclude certain tab name patterns.

title: Column based Cross platform ingestion support
description: Currently, cross platform processing (offline duplication logic) only works for NetworkIds but that should be extended for more dimensional columns like NetworkName, Channel for now

title: Raw data tables with original column names for debug and audit purposes
description: Currently, we do not store the raw customer data as it is anywhere on our side. We perform some level of transformation before saving the data. But this may not be useful for Auditing or Debugging from source purposes

title: Handle CSV files with empty rows
description: For file based data suppliers, the CSV or Excel sheets might contain empty rows which parses the date as 0001-01-01. SO we need to filter out these empty rows

title: Google Drive connector
description: We need google drive connector for Cabify client

title: Create a migration script for table schema changes
description: If we add/modify a column in Cost and Attribution model, then we need to apply those changes to existing tables in redshift using a migration script

title: Apps flyer new APIs integration for planet x
description: We need to integrate new AppsFlyer APIs and ingest the 6 months historical data. However, this should be done only if Robert's experiments are successful

title: Make the data ingestion task names more readable
description:
If we have only single instances of AppsFlyer, Supermetrics and S3 suppliers. Each should be prefixed with 1
Only when we have a second instance of any supplier, the index must be incremented and appended

Make it more readable like s3-data-import-cost-and-attribution and appsflyer-data-import-1


https://app.asana.com/app/asana/-/get_asset?asset_id=1211600940682816

title: Create GCS connector
description: We need a GCS connector in our new ETL to ingest data from GCS buckets

title: Add support for multiple date format
description:
Initial analysis by Claude


Supported Date Formats

Based on the parsing logic in TypeConversion.cs:132-156:

Format Category
Format Pattern
Example
Status
Notes
ISO 8601 (Recommended)
yyyy-MM-dd
2024-01-15
✅ Tested
Best choice - unambiguous


yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ
2024-01-15T10:30:00Z
✅ Tested
UTC timezone indicator


yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.fffZ
2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z
✅ Tested
With milliseconds


yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss
2024-01-15 10:30:00
✅ Tested
Space separator
ISO with Timezone Offset
yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.fff+HH:mm
2025-10-04T00:00:00.000+08:00
✅ Tested
Positive offset


yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.fff-HH:mm
2025-01-01T00:00:00.000-05:00
✅ Tested
Negative offset
Slash-Separated
yyyy/MM/dd
2025/10/11
✅ Tested
Used by Branch API


MM/dd/yyyy
01/15/2024
✅ Supported
US format only

Recommendations

✅Safe Formats(Use These)
    ISO 8601: 2024-01-15 (BEST CHOICE)
    Month names: Jan 15, 2024 or 15 Jan 2024
    ISO with time: 2024-01-15 10:30:00
❌Dangerous Formats(Avoid These)
    EU format: 15/01/2024 - Will fail or corrupt data
    Two-digit years: 01/15/24 - Ambiguous
    No separators: 20240115 - Not recognized
⚠️If You Must Use EU Format
You need to implement custom parsing logic (see my previous response with Option 1 or Option 2).
Would you like me to implement support for EU format, or help you standardize the date formats in your data sources?
